_meta.note: This file lists what needs to be captured. Run a Chrome MCP probe pass against the real BT home page to fill in concrete measurements. SRP corpus is the template (../srp/structural.json).

_todo_sections.name: hero_search_panel
_todo_sections.note: Main blue hero card with AI-search input ('Try …'), location field, condition+type quick filters. SRP search bar uses the same .ai-search-v2 pattern — see FIDELITY.md 'Search bar (Try + quote)' section for the matched spec we already have.

_todo_sections.name: ad_carousel_hero
_todo_sections.note: Rotating hero ad strip. Sandbox uses 6 procedural SVG creatives. Out-of-scope per SCOPE.md — visual stub only.

_todo_sections.name: boats_near_you_section
_todo_sections.note: Card rail of ~6 nearby boats based on geolocation. Sandbox uses fixed seed-deterministic list.

_todo_sections.name: featured_brands
_todo_sections.note: Grid of brand logos (Boston Whaler, Sea Ray, Bayliner, etc.) linking to /boats/?make=X.

_todo_sections.name: popular_boat_types
_todo_sections.note: Tile grid: Center Console, Bowrider, Yacht, Pontoon, etc.

_todo_sections.name: popular_boats
_todo_sections.note: Listing card rail (4-5 cards) — same shape as SRP listing card.

_capture_methodology: Open https://www.boattrader.com/ in Chrome MCP, then run the same structural probe pattern as srp/structural.json. Reuse FIDELITY.md rows where the element shape matches what the SRP/BDP already captured (e.g. .ai-search-v2 panel, listing card).
